tasks.title: Rewrite seed.py for v3
tasks.description: Rewrite backend/app/seed.py with v3 arenas (Practice, Bronze, Silver, Gold) and fictional users with agents (no bots/versions). Remove PRESETS import. Each fictional user gets 1 agent. Demo user gets 1 agent.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: 4 arenas: Practice, Bronze, Silver, Gold
AC-2: Fictional users have agents, not bots
GATE: python seed.py runs without errors

tasks.title: Delete dead code and clean imports
tasks.description: Delete: backend/app/queue_bots.py, backend/app/services/feedback_service.py (if exists). Verify no remaining imports of: Bot, BotVersion, ConfigurableBot, BotConfig, presets, pypokerengine, treys. Clean any orphaned imports across the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: AC-3: No remaining dead imports in codebase

tasks.title: Create E2E game test
tasks.description: Create backend/tests/test_e2e_game.py with integration test: register 2 users → create agents → join arena → scheduler tick matches → poll state → submit actions → hand completes → leave → verify wallet settlement and ELO update. Use test DB helper with in-memory SQLite.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Full game loop test passes

tasks.title: Create timeout tests
tasks.description: Create backend/tests/test_timeout.py with tests: timeout auto-fold, 3 consecutive timeouts → auto-leave, timeout counter resets on valid action.
